positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u38,axiom,
    ~romance(basque)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~member_of_family(X0,romance) | related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X1)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~member_of_family(X1,X2) | ~member_of_family(X0,X2) | related(X0,X1)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    french != spanish).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    related(german,spanish)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    german != basque).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    romance(spanish)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~related(basque,X0) | basque = X0).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    french != basque).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    spanish != basque).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    member_of_family(X0,romance) | ~romance(X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    french != german).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    spanish != german).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    romance(french)).

cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    ~romance(german)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X1) | ~romance(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define indo_european(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define family(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
